HGSS.552.0000:
Earl, I am!
Wonderful are Pokémon, yes!\f
Teach you I will to be a better Trainer!\f
What you want to know?
Want to be a winner is you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.552.0001:
Good! Teach you, I will!
In battle, Pokémon top on list,\r
the walking one, jump out first!\f
Change order in list, make battle
easy, maybe!\f
More from me you want to hear? [0200,0000]
HGSS.552.0002:
So, want to know how to raise
Pokémon well? [0200,0000]
HGSS.552.0003:
Fine! Teach you, I will!
If Pokémon come out in battle even\r
briefly, some Exp. Points it gets.\f
Keep out weak Pokémon,
switch in battle quick!\f
This way, weak Pokémon very
strong become!\r
More from me you want to hear? [0200,0000]
HGSS.552.0004:
So, want to know how to
battle well? [0200,0000]
HGSS.552.0005:
Fine! Teach you, I will!
Pokémon have goods and bads\r
because many types.\f
High-level Pokémon not win always
if bad types.\f
Pokémon with good types
for the foe, you choose.\r
Smart battle, it is!
HGSS.552.0006:
Oh! Smart student you are!
Nothing more do I teach!\f
Good to Pokémon you must be!
HGSS.552.0007:
I’m taking notes of the teacher’s
lecture.\f
I’d better copy the stuff on the
blackboard, too.
HGSS.552.0008:
I traded my best Pokémon to the
guy beside me.
HGSS.552.0009:
Huh? The Pokémon I just got is
holding something!
HGSS.552.0010:
...Some Berries can restore a
Pokémon’s health.\f
Many other items can be held
by Pokémon...\f
It sure is tough taking notes...
HGSS.552.0011:
Pokémon have what are called
abilities!\f
It seems that each kind of Pokémon has
distinct abilities.\f
They say these abilities come in handy
in battle!
HGSS.552.0012:
The blackboard explains Pokémon
status changes in battle.\f
HGSS.552.0014:
If poisoned, a Pokémon steadily
loses HP.\f
The poison lingers after the battle,
and HP is lost as you walk.\r
To cure it, use an Antidote.\f
HGSS.552.0015:
Paralysis reduces speed and may
prevent movement.\f
It remains after battle, so use
a Parlyz Heal.\f
HGSS.552.0016:
If asleep, your Pokémon can use only
certain moves, such as Sleep Talk and\r
Snore.\f
A sleeping Pokémon doesn’t wake up
after battle.\r
Wake it up with an Awakening.\f
HGSS.552.0017:
A burn consumes HP, little by little,
and also reduces the Attack stat.\f
A burn lingers after battle.
Use a Burn Heal as the cure.\f
HGSS.552.0018:
If your Pokémon is frozen,
it can’t do a thing.\f
It remains frozen after battle.
Thaw it out with an Ice Heal.\f
HGSS.552.0019:
It’s this kid’s notebook...\f
“Catch Pokémon using Poké Balls.
Up to six can be in your party.”\f
Keep reading? [0200,0000]
HGSS.552.0020:
“Before throwing a Poké Ball, weaken
the target first.”\f
“A poisoned or burned Pokémon is
easier to catch.”\f
Keep reading? [0200,0000]
HGSS.552.0021:
“Some moves may cause confusion.
Confusion may make a Pokémon attack\r
itself.”\f
“Leaving battle clears up any
confusion.”\f
Keep reading? [0200,0000]
HGSS.552.0022:
“People who catch and use Pokémon
in battle are called Pokémon Trainers.”\f
“They are expected to visit Pokémon
Gyms and defeat other Trainers.”\f
The next page is... Blank!\f
HGSS.552.0023:
Boy: E-he-he...
I haven’t written any more...
